mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS productId, p.name AS productName, w.id AS warehouseId, w.name AS warehouseName, IFNULL(s.count, 0) AS currentStock, IFNULL(p.safe_stock, 0) AS safetyStock, 0 AS maxStock FROM erp_stock s INNER JOIN erp_product p ON s.product_id = p.id AND p.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN erp_warehouse w ON s.warehouse_id = w.id AND w.deleted = 0 WHERE s.deleted = 0

SELECT i.product_id AS productId, i.warehouse_id AS warehouse_id, SUM(i.count) AS totalOutCount FROM erp_stock_out_item i INNER JOIN erp_stock_out o ON i.out_id = o.id WHERE i.deleted = 0 AND o.deleted = 0 AND o.out_time >= #{startTime} AND o.out_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY i.product_id, i.warehouse_id
SELECT * FROM erp_stock_ai_suggest WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time = ( SELECT MAX(create_time) FROM erp_stock_ai_suggest WHERE deleted = 0 ) ORDER BY priority ASC, id DESC
